title: rubus hassicus
intro: Rubus hassicus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to the Himalayas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hassicus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus hassicus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
